englishDefinitions: (transitive, informal) To pull something out with a sudden jerk.
(transitive, informal) To complete or produce rapidly.
persianTranslation: (متعدی، غیررسمی) بیرون کشیدن چیزی با یک تکان ناگهانی.
(متعدی، غیر رسمی) تکمیل یا تولید سریع.
examples: He suddenly whipped out his gun and pointed it at his doctor.
I whipped out my wallet and laid a five-pound note on the bar.
You need the report by this afternoon? No problem! I will whip one out for you in 10 minutes.
